message:
feat(core): add signal handling + JoinError to runtime_compat (ft-e34d9.9)

Add signal primitives for eventual web.rs migration from direct tokio::signal:
- signal::ctrl_c() — async Ctrl+C (SIGINT) listener
- signal::unix::{signal, SignalKind, Signal} — Unix signal stream wrapper
- JoinError re-export for task join handle error handling

8 new tests: ctrl_c timeout, SIGTERM/SIGHUP/SIGUSR1/SIGUSR2 construction,
recv timeout, actual SIGUSR1 delivery via Command, JoinError type check.

Total: 180 inline tests in runtime_compat, 12,975 lib tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
